message:
fix: security hardening and bundle --force implementation

- github.rs: Only send auth token to GitHub URLs (prevents token leakage)
- tombstone.rs: Add path traversal validation to purge/restore functions
- tombstone.rs: Use record.is_directory instead of filesystem check (TOCTOU fix)
- bundle.rs: Implement proper --force flag for bundle install
- blob.rs: Minor style cleanup (format!() -> .to_string())

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
